title: Extra Dyables
description: Adds dyed variants to the bookshelf, workbench, glass, seat, and bed.
body:
Extra Dyables is a Better Than Adventure! mod that adds dyable versions of the bookshelf, workbench, glass block, door and trapdoor, along with the seat and bed.

These blocks can be dyed with the crafting grid or by using a paintbrush.

The seat and bed crafting recipies will now always result in the white variation, requiring you to dye them after crafting.
